# Developer Marketing Community

> The largest Slack community for developer marketing professionals.

Website: https://marketingto.dev
Join: https://marketingto.dev/#join
Login: https://devmarketingcommunity.slack.com
Code of Conduct: https://marketingto.dev/code

## About

The Developer Marketing Community is a Slack-based community of 2,000+ professionals focused on marketing APIs, developer tools, and developer-first products. Members include founders, marketers, and growth leaders from companies like GitHub, Microsoft, Supabase, Docker, Sentry, Algolia, Vercel, Elastic, Hashnode, Nginx, Prisma, Snyk, Hasura, Snowflake, PostHog, and Kong.

## Why Join

- **Developer marketing only**: Actively discussing relevant API marketing topics. No fluff. No noise.
- **Globally distributed**: Members from the West Coast to New Zealand — there's always someone in your time zone.
- **Actionable experiences**: Expertise in SEO, CRM, PMM, GTM, and everything in between.

## Slack Channels

- **#ask-anything**: The most active channel for pressing questions — Product Hunt, emails, ads, SEO, and more. Speak with people doing similar things in the space.
- **#share-anything**: A spam-free space to share knowledge, resources, and ideas. An incredible wealth of resources to learn from and engage with.
- **#raise-capital**: Engage with founders, investors, and GTM experts in developer tooling to join you on building your startup.
- **#jobs**: Whether you're looking for something new or want to share openings on your team, reach out to people in the same niche.
- **#watercooler-chat**: For anything that doesn't fit the other channels, or just to shoot the breeze.

- "The only Slack where I actually learn stuff!" — Martin Perreau, CEO & Co-Founder @ Munity
- "Really excited to be a part of this community!" — Taylor Page, Director of Growth Marketing @ Kong
- "Been here 20 min and already folks are sharing great advice." — Charles Cook, VP Marketing & Ops @ Posthog
- "Looks like THE place to be. Glad I found out about this." — Heather Simpson, Marketing @ Pangea
- "Probably the best community I've ever been in." — Morgan Perry, Co-Founder @ Qovery
- "More value than almost any other Slack community." — Zevi Reinitz, Product Marketing @ Livecycle
- "Absolutely love this vibrant and supportive community!" — Sagar Kava, Co-founder @ VideoSDK
- "An essential community for anyone in devtools." — Jack Bridger, Host @ Scaling DevTools
- "Fantastic community with actionable insights." — Praveen Koka, VP Engineering @ ROQ.ai

## Companies Represented

GitHub, Microsoft, Supabase, Docker, Sentry, Algolia, Vercel, Elastic, Hashnode, Nginx, Prisma, Snyk, Hasura, Snowflake, PostHog, Kong, Qovery, Pangea, Livecycle, VideoSDK, and many more.
